issue_summary: Fix for - Files over 2GB will result in an incorrect count being returned by the getCount() and resetCount() methods (as they return an integer). These methods have been deprecated and new getByteCount() and resetByteCount() methods have been added which return a long.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * The number of bytes that have passed through this stream.
     *
     * @return the number of bytes accumulated
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * The number of bytes that have passed through this stream. *

* WARNING This method will return an * incorrect count for files over 2GB - use * getByteCount() instead. * * @return the number of bytes accumulated * @deprecated use getByteCount() - see issue IO-84 */
